title: stelis velaticauloides
intro: Stelis velaticauloides, also known as the "velate-stemmed Stelis", is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis velaticauloides include its potential to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Stelis velaticauloides include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
